https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/十七世神 https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/出雲国造 {{chart top|template_name=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|{{{title|{{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}}}}}}}{{familytree/start|style = font-size:80%| summary=Boxes and lines diagram with 75 boxes}} {{chart/start}} {{chart|border=1| | | | | | |Oya | | |Sus | Oya={{nowrap| [[Ōyamatsumi]]{{Cite web |url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=132 |title=Ōyamatsumi |first=Nakayama |last=Kaoru |date=7 May 2005 |publisher=Encyclopedia of Shinto |access-date=2010-09-29}}}}| boxstyle_Oya=background:lightblue;| Sus={{nowrap| [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]{{Cite web |url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=143 |title=Susanoo |first=Kadoya |last=Atsushi |date=10 May 2005 |publisher=Encyclopedia of Shinto |access-date=2010-09-29}}{{Cite web|url=https://www.britannica.com/topic/Susanoo|title=Susanoo | Description & Mythology|website=Encyclopedia Britannica}}{{rp|277}}}}| boxstyle_Sus=background:lightblue;}} {{chart|border=1| | |,|-|-|v|-|^|-|v|-|-|t|-|-|.}} {{chart|border=1| | |!| | |!| | | |!| | |)|-|v|Kamu | Kamu={{nowrap| [[Kamuo Ichihime]]{{cite web|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%A4%A7%E5%B9%B4%E7%A5%9E-450354|script-title=ja:大年神|trans-title=Ōtoshi-no-kami|publisher=[[Kotobank]]|language=ja|access-date=5 May 2023|archive-date=5 June 2023|archive-url=https://archive.today/20230605234250/https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%A4%A7%E5%B9%B4%E7%A5%9E-450354|url-status=live}}{{cite web|url=http://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/otoshinokami/|script-title=ja:大年神|trans-title=Ōtoshi-no-kami|publisher=[[Kokugakuin University]]|language=ja|access-date=5 May 2023|archive-date=5 June 2023|archive-url=https://archive.today/20230605235208/http://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/otoshinokami/|url-status=live}}}}| boxstyle_Kamu=background:pink;}} {{chart|border=1| | |!| | |!| | | |!| | |!| |)|-|-|-|.}} {{chart|border=1| |Kon2 |Ash |y|Tan | |!|Toshi| |Uka | Kon2=[[Konohanachiru-hime]]{{Cite web |last=Mori |first=Mizue |title=Yashimajinumi |url=https://d-museum.kokugakuin.ac.jp/eos/detail/?id=9724 |website=[[Kokugakuin University]] Encyclopedia of Shinto}}{{rp|277}}| boxstyle_Kon2=background:pink;| Ash=[[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi|Ashinazuchi]]{{cite book | last=Frédéric | first=L. | author2=Louis-Frédéric | last3=Roth | first3=K. | title=Japan Encyclopedia | publisher=Belknap Press of Harvard University Press | series=Harvard University Press reference library | year=2005 | isbn=978-0-674-01753-5 | url=https://books.google.com/books?id=p2QnPijAEmEC | access-date=2020-11-21 }}{{Cite web |title=My Shinto: Personal Descriptions of Japanese Religion and Culture |url=https://www2.kokugakuin.ac.jp/~n-havens/myshinto/htmlfile/mmori02.html |access-date=2023-10-16 |website=www2.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}| boxstyle_Ash=background:lightblue;| Tan=[[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi|Tenazuchi]]| boxstyle_Tan=background:pink;| Toshi={{nowrap|[[Toshigami]]}}| boxstyle_Toshi=background:lightblue;| Uka={{nowrap|[[Ukanomitama]]Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj026.htm Section XIX.—The Palace of Suga.]Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-of-the-Great-Land.]
([[:en:Inari Ōkami|Inari]])“‘My Own Inari’: Personalization of the Deity in Inari Worship.” ''Japanese Journal of Religious Studies'' 23, no. 1/2 (1996): 87-88}}| boxstyle_Uka=background:pink;}} {{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | |!| | | | |!| |!}} {{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | |!| | | | |!|Sann | Sann={{nowrap|[[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Oyamakui]]{{Cite web |date=2022-08-17 |title=Ōtoshi {{!}} 國學院大學デジタルミュージアム |url=https://d-museum.kokugakuin.ac.jp/eos/detail/?id=9164 |access-date=2023-11-14 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220817071922/https://d-museum.kokugakuin.ac.jp/eos/detail/?id=9164 |archive-date=2022-08-17 }}}}| boxstyle_Sann=background:silver;}} {{chart|border=1| | |!| | | |Kush |-|-|-|(| Kush=[[Kushinadahime]]{{Cite web|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=102|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Kushinadahime|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}{{rp|277}}| boxstyle_Kush=background:pink;}} {{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | | | | | | |!}} {{chart|border=1| | |`|-|-|-|-|v|-|-|-|AS | AS=[[Yashimajinumi]]{{rp|277}}| boxstyle_AS=background:lightblue;}} {{chart|border=1| | | | | | | |!}} {{chart|border=1| |Kag | | | |!| Kag=[[Kagu-tsuchi|Kagutsuchi]]{{Cite web|url=https://www.worldhistory.org/Kagutsuchi/|title=Kagutsuchi|website=[[World History Encyclopedia]]}}| boxstyle_Kag=background:lightblue;}} {{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | |!}} {{chart|border=1| |K1 | | | |!| K1=[[Kuraokami]]{{cite book | last=Ashkenazi | first=M. | title=Handbook of Japanese Mythology | publisher=ABC-CLIO | series=Handbooks of world mythology | year=2003 | isbn=978-1-57607-467-1 | url=https://books.google.com/books?id=gqs-y9R2AekC&pg=PA213 | access-date=2020-11-21 | page=213}}| boxstyle_K1=background:lightblue;}} {{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | |!}} {{chart|border=1| |TA |-|v|YA | TA={{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}} {{cite book | last=Chamberlain | first=B.H. | access-date=2020-11-21 }} {{rp|278}}| boxstyle_TA=background:pink;|
